title: Credential Issuance
description: Create Credential model. Implement POST /api/v1/credentials that generates a secure random API key (32 bytes, base62-encoded), stores argon2 hash, returns raw key exactly once in response. Support bootstrap credential type for self-registration flow. Implement list (masked) and revoke endpoints. Add audit event on every credential operation.
validation: Alembic migration created for Credential table
Only argon2 hash is stored, not raw key
Raw key returned exactly once in POST response
AuditEvent created for each credential operation
Tests verify raw key is never stored
notes: All validation criteria met. 48 tests passing. Includes: secure API key generation (32-byte base62), argon2 hashing, credential CRUD endpoints, audit logging, and rotation. See task-1.4-completion-summary.md for details.
